docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER MBNA AMERICA BANK,N.A. AS TO RESPONDENT KWOK, FRANKY W. DOES 1-5,INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

NTC OF HRG RE: MTN IN SUPP OF PETITION TO CONFIRM ARB AWARD; NTC OF NONAPPEARANCE, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER MBNA AMERICA BANK,N.A. HEARING SET FOR APR-27-2006 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER MBNA AMERICA BANK, N.A.'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN, REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-27-2006 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
POS OF (PROPOSED) ORDER GRANTING PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD; JUDGMENT BY COURT FILED BY PETITIONER MBNA AMERICA BANK,N.A.
ORDER GRANTING PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD (NO SASE; COPY IN DEPT. 301 OUT BOX)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER MBNA AMERICA BANK,N.A. RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT KWOK, FRANKY W. $30,069.78 PRINCIPAL, $5,882.14 ATTORNEY FEES, $335.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $36,287.42, (NO SASE; COPY IN DEPT. 301 OUT BOX) SEE SCANNED DOC
